meaning: A step-by-step history or record that provides documentary evidence of the sequence of activities that have affected a transaction.
definition: A step-by-step history or record that provides documentary evidence of the sequence of activities that have affected a transaction.
example: The software creates an audit trail that records every time a user accesses financial records.
exampleHindi: सॉफ़्टवेयर एक ऑडिट ट्रेल बनाता है जो उपयोगकर्ता द्वारा वित्तीय रिकॉर्ड तक पहुंचने पर हर बार रिकॉर्ड करता है।

meaning: A set of rules outlining the social norms, religious rules, and responsibilities of, or proper practices for, an individual.
definition: A set of rules outlining the social norms, religious rules, and responsibilities of, or proper practices for, an individual.
example: The employee code of conduct strictly prohibits the use of company computers for personal shopping.
exampleHindi: कर्मचारी आचार संहिता व्यक्तिगत खरीदारी के लिए कंपनी के कंप्यूटर के उपयोग पर सख्ती से रोक लगाती है।

meaning: The act of obeying rules, laws, regulations, and internal standards of a company or industry.
example: The company invested in new filters to ensure compliance with environmental protection laws.
exampleHindi: कंपनी ने पर्यावरण संरक्षण कानूनों का अनुपालन सुनिश्चित करने के लिए नए फिल्टर में निवेश किया।

meaning: An employee whose job is to ensure that a company complies with all relevant laws and regulations.
definition: An employee whose job is to ensure that a company complies with all relevant laws and regulations.
example: The compliance officer checked the export logs to make sure no trade restrictions were violated.
exampleHindi: अनुपालन अधिकारी ने यह सुनिश्चित करने के लिए निर्यात लॉग की जाँच की कि किसी व्यापार प्रतिबंध का उल्लंघन नहीं किया गया है।

meaning: A situation in which a person's private interests or relationships could compromise their professional judgment.
definition: A situation in which a person's private interests or relationships could compromise their professional judgment.
example: Hiring the director's brother without a public job posting was seen as a clear conflict of interest.
exampleHindi: सार्वजनिक नौकरी की पोस्टिंग के बिना निदेशक के भाई को काम पर रखना स्पष्ट रूप से हितों के टकराव के रूप में देखा गया।

meaning: The framework of rules, relationships, systems, and processes by which corporations are directed and controlled.
definition: The framework of rules, relationships, systems, and processes by which corporations are directed and controlled.
example: Strong corporate governance prevents executives from abusing their power or using company funds for personal use.
exampleHindi: मजबूत कॉर्पोरेट प्रशासन अधिकारियों को अपनी शक्ति का दुरुपयोग करने या व्यक्तिगत उपयोग के लिए कंपनी के धन का उपयोग करने से रोकता है।

meaning: A business model in which companies integrate social and environmental concerns into their operations and interactions.
definition: A business model in which companies integrate social and environmental concerns into their operations and interactions.
example: As part of its corporate social responsibility, the retail giant pledged to eliminate single-use plastics.
exampleHindi: अपनी कॉर्पोरेट सामाजिक जिम्मेदारी के हिस्से के रूप में, खुदरा दिग्गज ने एकल-उपयोग प्लास्टिक को खत्म करने का संकल्प लिया।

meaning: An employee who is managed directly by another person in the company hierarchy.
definition: An employee who is managed directly by another person in the company hierarchy.
example: The vice president has five direct reports, including the directors of marketing and sales.
exampleHindi: उपराष्ट्रपति के पास पाँच प्रत्यक्ष रिपोर्टें हैं, जिनमें विपणन और बिक्री निदेशक भी शामिल हैं।

meaning: The research and investigation done by a company or person before signing a contract or making a business deal.
definition: Careful and thorough research before making a decision (strong alternative to 'checking carefully').
example: The tech firm performed due diligence on the startup before buying it to make sure there were no hidden debts.
exampleHindi: टेक फर्म ने इसे खरीदने से पहले स्टार्टअप पर उचित परिश्रम किया ताकि यह सुनिश्चित किया जा सके कि कोई छिपा हुआ ऋण न हो।

meaning: A complex situation in business where a choice must be made between two moral principles, neither of which is clearly right.
definition: A complex situation in business where a choice must be made between two moral principles, neither of which is clearly right.
example: Deciding whether to report a minor safety error that would delay a critical launch created an ethical dilemma.
exampleHindi: यह तय करना कि क्या एक छोटी सी सुरक्षा त्रुटि की रिपोर्ट की जाए जिससे महत्वपूर्ण लॉन्च में देरी होगी, एक नैतिक दुविधा पैदा हो गई।

meaning: The principles of conduct that govern an individual or group, defining what is morally right and wrong in business.
definition: The principles of conduct that govern an individual or group, defining what is morally right and wrong in business.
example: Selling low-quality products under a premium label violates our company's ethical standards.
exampleHindi: प्रीमियम लेबल के तहत निम्न-गुणवत्ता वाले उत्पाद बेचना हमारी कंपनी के नैतिक मानकों का उल्लंघन है।

meaning: An institutional arrangement designed to help producers in developing countries achieve better trading conditions.
definition: An institutional arrangement designed to help producers in developing countries achieve better trading conditions.
example: By purchasing fair trade coffee beans, the cafe ensures that local farmers are paid a fair price.
exampleHindi: निष्पक्ष व्यापार कॉफी बीन्स खरीदकर, कैफे यह सुनिश्चित करता है कि स्थानीय किसानों को उचित मूल्य दिया जाए।

meaning: A legal obligation to act in the best financial interest of another party, such as a company's shareholders.
definition: A legal obligation to act in the best financial interest of another party, such as a company's shareholders.
example: The board members have a fiduciary duty to manage the pension fund responsibly.
exampleHindi: पेंशन फंड का जिम्मेदारीपूर्वक प्रबंधन करना बोर्ड के सदस्यों का कर्तव्य है।

meaning: The practice of managing money and financial resources in a wise, balanced, and sustainable manner.
definition: The practice of managing money and financial resources in a wise, balanced, and sustainable manner.
example: By keeping expenses low and saving for emergencies, the non-profit demonstrated excellent fiscal responsibility.
exampleHindi: खर्चों को कम रखकर और आपात स्थिति के लिए बचत करके, गैर-लाभकारी संस्था ने उत्कृष्ट राजकोषीय जिम्मेदारी का प्रदर्शन किया।

meaning: The system of rules, practices, and processes by which a firm is directed, controlled, and managed.
definition: The system of rules, practices, and processes by which a firm is directed, controlled, and managed.
example: Good corporate governance builds investor confidence and protects the interests of shareholders.
exampleHindi: अच्छा कॉर्पोरेट प्रशासन निवेशकों का विश्वास बढ़ाता है और शेयरधारकों के हितों की रक्षा करता है।

meaning: An independent, objective evaluation of a company's financial records, internal controls, and operational processes.
definition: An independent, objective evaluation of a company's financial records, internal controls, and operational processes.
example: The internal audit helped the company find areas where employees were bypassing safety procedures.
exampleHindi: आंतरिक ऑडिट से कंपनी को उन क्षेत्रों का पता लगाने में मदद मिली जहां कर्मचारी सुरक्षा प्रक्रियाओं को दरकिनार कर रहे थे।

meaning: A duty or responsibility that is enforced by law, requiring a person or organization to act in a certain way.
definition: A duty or responsibility that is enforced by law, requiring a person or organization to act in a certain way.
example: The company has a legal obligation to pay its employees at least the minimum wage.
exampleHindi: कंपनी का अपने कर्मचारियों को कम से कम न्यूनतम वेतन देने का कानूनी दायित्व है।

meaning: The state of being legally responsible for something, such as a debt, injury, or product defect.
definition: à¤¦à¤¾à¤¯à¤¿à¤¤à¥à¤µ / à¤œà¤¿à¤®à¥à¤®à¥‡à¤¦à¤¾à¤°à¥€
example: The toy manufacturer faced significant liability after a design defect caused injuries to children.
exampleHindi: डिज़ाइन की खराबी के कारण बच्चों को चोट लगने के बाद खिलौना निर्माता को महत्वपूर्ण दायित्व का सामना करना पड़ा।

meaning: A legal document that a person signs to agree not to hold a company responsible for any injuries or damages.
definition: A legal document that a person signs to agree not to hold a company responsible for any injuries or damages.
example: Before climbing the indoor rock wall, visitors must sign a liability waiver.
exampleHindi: इनडोर रॉक दीवार पर चढ़ने से पहले, आगंतुकों को दायित्व माफी पर हस्ताक्षर करना होगा।

meaning: Taking proactive steps to reduce the likelihood or impact of potential problems or hazards.
definition: Taking proactive steps to reduce the likelihood or impact of potential problems or hazards.
example: Installing security cameras and alarms was our primary method of mitigating risk of theft.
exampleHindi: सुरक्षा कैमरे और अलार्म स्थापित करना चोरी के जोखिम को कम करने का हमारा प्राथमिक तरीका था।

meaning: A legally binding contract that prevents employees or partners from sharing a company's confidential information.
definition: A legally binding contract that prevents employees or partners from sharing a company's confidential information.
example: The new engineer signed a non-disclosure agreement to protect the design details of the secret project.
exampleHindi: नए इंजीनियर ने गुप्त परियोजना के डिज़ाइन विवरण की सुरक्षा के लिए एक गैर-प्रकटीकरण समझौते पर हस्ताक्षर किए।

meaning: A systematic examination of a quality system carried out by an internal or external quality auditor.
definition: A systematic examination of a quality system carried out by an internal or external quality auditor.
example: Our factory passed the annual quality audit, confirming that we meet international manufacturing standards.
exampleHindi: हमारे कारखाने ने वार्षिक गुणवत्ता ऑडिट पास किया है, जिससे पुष्टि होती है कि हम अंतरराष्ट्रीय विनिर्माण मानकों को पूरा करते हैं।

meaning: An organization's adherence to laws, regulations, guidelines, and specifications relevant to its business operations.
definition: An organization's adherence to laws, regulations, guidelines, and specifications relevant to its business operations.
example: The bank hired extra staff to handle the complex paperwork required for regulatory compliance.
exampleHindi: नियामक अनुपालन के लिए आवश्यक जटिल कागजी कार्रवाई को संभालने के लिए बैंक ने अतिरिक्त कर्मचारियों को नियुक्त किया।

meaning: A system of regulations and the means, like laws and agencies, used to enforce them in a particular industry.
definition: A system of regulations and the means, like laws and agencies, used to enforce them in a particular industry.
example: The medical device startup had to navigate a complex regulatory framework before selling its product.
exampleHindi: मेडिकल डिवाइस स्टार्टअप को अपना उत्पाद बेचने से पहले एक जटिल नियामक ढांचे से गुजरना पड़ा।

meaning: The job of supervising or taking care of something, such as an organization's resources, environment, or assets.
definition: The job of supervising or taking care of something, such as an organization's resources, environment, or assets.
example: Environmental stewardship is a core principle for the forestry company, which plants three trees for every one cut down.
exampleHindi: पर्यावरण प्रबंधन वानिकी कंपनी के लिए एक मुख्य सिद्धांत है, जो प्रत्येक काटे गए पेड़ के लिए तीन पेड़ लगाता है।

meaning: The ability to track the history, application, or location of an item or activity using recorded documentation.
definition: The ability to track the history, application, or location of an item or activity using recorded documentation.
example: Food traceability allows the supermarket chain to find which farm a contaminated batch of lettuce came from.
exampleHindi: भोजन का पता लगाने की क्षमता सुपरमार्केट श्रृंखला को यह पता लगाने की अनुमति देती है कि लेट्यूस का दूषित बैच किस खेत से आया है।

meaning: An employee or insider who reports illegal, unethical, or dishonest activities happening within an organization.
definition: An employee or insider who reports illegal, unethical, or dishonest activities happening within an organization.
example: The whistleblower exposed the company's illegal dumping of chemical waste into the river.
exampleHindi: व्हिसलब्लोअर ने कंपनी द्वारा नदी में रासायनिक कचरे की अवैध डंपिंग का पर्दाफाश किया।

meaning: A policy of punishing all violations of a rule, no matter how minor, with no exceptions or excuses.
definition: A policy of punishing all violations of a rule, no matter how minor, with no exceptions or excuses.
example: The tech company has a zero tolerance policy for discrimination or harassment in the workplace.
exampleHindi: टेक कंपनी की कार्यस्थल पर भेदभाव या उत्पीड़न के प्रति शून्य सहनशीलता की नीति है।
